claim_bullets.bullet_text: A wound may become infected, treated as an illness. (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.159-167)
The unknown spirit of life restores balance by guiding other spirits. (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.159-167)
This poison only affects you if you lose at least one life‑force point from a poisoned blade. (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.159-167)
Once a poison has entered, it cannot be driven out. (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.159-167)
Inhaled poisons in gas or powder activate when breathed in. (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.159-167)

source_record_text: This source details Sword World RPG rules governing poison, illness, infection, and their treatments, including definitions, contagion, and resistance mechanics.
